meaning_en: a typical example or model of something; a way of thinking about or understanding something
having a rough, uneven surface; wild and difficult to travel through
natural changes and variations occurring in the course of something; ups and downs of fortune or circumstance.
Bags and suitcases you take when traveling
an important discovery or development that removes a barrier to progress
described as less important or serious than it really is
meaning_ar: أقل من الحقيقة، لا يُقدر حق قدره

meaning_en: Completely changed something in a very important way
meaning_ar: ثوَّر، غيَّر جذرياً، أحدث ثورة في

meaning_en: increasing by adding one thing after another; building up over time
Channels or means through which something is transmitted or conveyed
meaning_ar: قنوات أو وسائل لنقل أو إيصال شيء معين

meaning_en: complex or unwelcome consequences of an action or decision
very difficult to deal with; causing fear or respect because of size or power
meaning_ar: هائل، مخيف، صعب جداً في التعامل معه

meaning_en: to cause or accelerate a reaction or change; to trigger something
meaning_ar: يحفز، يسرّع، يثير تفاعلاً أو تغييراً

meaning_en: A system of methods and principles used in a particular activity or field of study.
Having the power to decide an outcome; conclusive and final
meaning_ar: حاسم، قاطع، فاصل، مؤثر بشكل قاطع

meaning_en: The process of something being damaged or made worse; deterioration
the process of putting a decision, plan, or system into effect; making something active or effective
Official book that shows who you are and lets you travel to other countries
To have continuing and serious effects; to echo or resound
meaning_ar: يتردد صداه، يؤثر بشكل مستمر، له تأثيرات ممتدة

meaning_en: serving as a typical example or model; representing a fundamental change in approach or thinking
meaning_ar: نموذجي، يمثل تغييراً جوهرياً في النهج أو التفكير

meaning_en: coming together from different directions to meet at a point; gradually becoming similar
Very interesting and causing curiosity; fascinating in a mysterious way
the basic physical and organizational structures needed for the operation of a society or enterprise

the path or direction that something follows through time or space
limitations or restrictions that prevent free action
the process of making something accessible to everyone; removing barriers to participation

meaning_en: The quality of being easy to reach, enter, or use; availability to everyone including those with disabilities
meaning_ar: إمكانية الوصول، السهولة في الاستخدام، التوفر للجميع

meaning_en: the possible results, effects, or meanings of an action or decision
things that delay or prevent movement, development, or progress; obstacles or barriers.
The process of adjusting or correcting something to improve its accuracy or effectiveness
Things that people and animals eat to live and grow
very severe, rough, or unpleasant; difficult to survive in
old-fashioned and no longer suitable for modern conditions; outdated
meaning_ar: عتيق، قديم الطراز، غير مناسب للعصر الحديث

meaning_en: including everything; complete and detailed
developed gradually over time; changed and improved
the great size, extent, or importance of something
having many small parts or details that fit together in a complicated way
A typical example, pattern, or model of something; a framework of concepts
developed or improved through care and effort; refined through education and training

meaning_en: an inclination or natural tendency to behave in a particular way
meaning_ar: ميل طبيعي، نزعة، استعداد للتصرف بطريقة معينة

meaning_en: to control or manage according to rules; to keep something steady or balanced
Departures from what is normal, usual, or expected; deviations from the typical pattern
meaning_ar: انحرافات عما هو طبيعي أو معتاد أو متوقع؛ انحرافات عن النمط النموذجي

meaning_en: Took back control or possession of; recovered for a new or better use
meaning_ar: استرد، استعاد السيطرة على، أعاد تأهيل أو استخدام لغرض أفضل

meaning_en: a complete change of form, nature, or substance; transformation
meaning_ar: تحول جذري، تغيير كامل في الشكل أو الطبيعة

meaning_en: Divisions or contrasts between two things that are opposite or entirely different
meaning_ar: تناقضات أو انقسامات بين شيئين متضادين

meaning_en: Found something that was already there but unknown before
meaning_ar: اكتشف - وجد شيئاً كان موجوداً لكنه غير معروف من قبل

meaning_en: relating to moral principles and what is considered right or wrong behavior
Keeping something in its original state; protecting from harm, decay, or loss; maintaining
A model or pattern; a way of thinking about or understanding something

meaning_en: A process where something spreads rapidly from one person or place to many others, like a waterfall effect

meaning_en: The possible results, effects, or meanings of an action or decision that may not be immediately obvious.
best or most favorable; most effective under particular conditions
Related to spectroscopy, the study of light and radiation to analyze materials
to provide evidence to support or prove the truth of a claim or statement
To expect or predict something; to prepare for or react to something before it happens
to kill, destroy, or remove a large proportion of something
revealing something hitherto unknown; giving new and significant information
to adjust precisely for a particular function; to measure or determine accurately

meaning_en: To wander aimlessly or follow a winding course; to move or proceed in a leisurely, indirect way

meaning_en: Moved to a new place or position; changed location

meaning_en: a series of events in which each one causes the next, like a waterfall effect
meaning_ar: سلسلة من الأحداث حيث يؤدي كل حدث إلى التالي، تأثير متتالي

meaning_en: A complex combination of many different elements forming a rich whole; originally a decorative textile
meaning_ar: نسيج معقد من عناصر مختلفة متداخلة؛ مزيج غني ومتنوع

meaning_en: to cause surprise or confusion; to prove a theory or expectation to be wrong.
moves slowly from side to side in a smooth, gentle way

meaning_en: evoking interest or attention in a forceful way; convincing and persuasive
To give in to something overwhelming or die from something, especially illness or pressure

meaning_en: To grow and develop successfully; to prosper
to spread throughout something; to pass through or penetrate completely
copying or trying to equal or excel; imitating with the aim to match or surpass

extremely strict, precise, and demanding in requirements or standards.
The logical basis or fundamental reason for a course of action or belief
the main character or leading figure in a particular situation or movement
Existing as a natural or basic part of something; built-in or intrinsic

meaning_ar: يدمج، يشمل، يضم شيئاً كجزء من كل أكبر

meaning_en: showing a willingness to take surprisingly bold risks; extremely daring or fearless.
Too great to be overcome; impossible to surmount or defeat
meaning_ar: لا يمكن التغلب عليه، مستحيل التجاوز، لا يقهر

to cause something to happen suddenly or too soon
Something that is extremely important and must be done; an essential requirement

meaning_en: to cause or accelerate a reaction or process; to act as a stimulus for change or action.

meaning_en: Very new and important; introducing new ideas or methods

Existing as a natural or basic part of something; intrinsic
to shock or excite into taking action; to stimulate into activity

machines that can move and do work like humans
To reject as unworthy of consideration; to refuse to take seriously
